title: Pan-Seared Cod with Norwegian Stew
description: A delicate and flavorful dish featuring cod, norwegian stew, and silky sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the cod fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake the cod for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the cod is baking, heat the norwegian stew in a saucepan over low heat.
Stir in the silky sauce and floral water.
Serve the cod with the norwegian stew and silky sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
